overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a post-apocalyptic wilderness with distinctive red vegetation, scattered trees, and distant mountains. The character navigates a winding dirt path through mixed terrain and passes by mechanical creatures lurking near the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: wilderness trail with mixed red and green vegetation

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the dirt path through the wilderness, bow equipped on back

entered.detail: dense patch of distinctive red vegetation lining the right side of the path
winding dirt trail with scattered rocks and patches of grass
green bushes and low vegetation lining the left side of the trail
sparse oak and pine trees visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy running along a dirt trail through a post-apocalyptic wilderness. Red tallgrass dominates the right side while green shrubs line the left, with scattered trees visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert-like landscape with distant mountains

events.description: terrain shifts from dense vegetation to more arid, rocky landscape with Joshua trees

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the path as the environment opens up to reveal distant mountains

entered.detail: large snow-capped mountain range visible in the far distance
distinctive spiky Joshua trees scattered across the landscape
exposed rocks and boulders along the trail edges
clusters of bright yellow flowers growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more arid, open landscape with Joshua trees and rocky outcrops. The distant mountain range becomes visible in the background while yellow wildflowers dot the trail sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky trail with mechanical creature encounter

events.description: character approaches and passes by mechanical creatures lurking near the trail on the left

agents.ego_description: running past mechanical creatures while maintaining distance, weapon ready

notable_agents.action: mechanical creature standing idle near the trail, observing the character

entered.detail: large mechanical animal-like machines with blue and purple glowing components
leafless dead trees and branches near the path
large rock formations and boulders along the right side

segments.scene_description: Aloy runs past mechanical creatures lurking on the left side of the trail. The terrain features dead trees and rocky outcrops as the path continues through the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside trail with red vegetation

agents.ego_description: running uphill through a section with dense red vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: hillsides covered in dense red tallgrass and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Aloy running through a section where red vegetation covers the hillsides on both sides of the trail. The path becomes rockier as it winds through the terrain with scattered trees providing partial cover overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Aloy runs through a post-apocalyptic wilderness that shifts from lush, colorful grasslands to a rugged, rocky terrain. It begins with the character sprinting along a dirt trail flanked by red tallgrass and green shrubs under a partly cloudy sky. As the path progresses, the environment transitions into a more arid landscape where Joshua trees and yellow wildflowers appear against a backdrop of distant mountains. The scene then shifts past mechanical creatures lurking among dead trees and rocky outcrops before the trail winds further into the wilderness. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rocky as the path is enclosed by hillsides blanketed in red vegetation and scattered overhead trees.
